global.description: The ad features a clean layout with abstract shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting financial clarity and peace of mind.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of circular and square shapes in soft green tones, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: A smaller circular shape in a lighter green, located centrally above the main shapes.

elements.label: Main square shape
elements.description: A prominent square shape in a muted green color, centered within the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape in a light green color, positioned towards the bottom left.

elements.label: Another small shape
elements.description: A slightly larger circular shape in a light green color, located towards the bottom center.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your money, clearer' with a smaller tagline below it in a lighter font.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The word 'ClearLedger' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button-like text 'Watch now' in bold white, located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with soft colors, ClearLedger, financial clarity.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
